title: oxytropis kudoana var. hidaka-montana
intro: Oxytropis kudoana var. hidaka-montana, also known as a type of mountain milkvetch, is a perennial plant native to Japan. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in herbal remedies, due to its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oxytropis kudoana var. hidaka-montana are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
